YouTube: Watch, Listen, Stream.summary:
Data Used to Track You:
The app introduced a tracking section that uses contact details like your physical address, email, and phone number, as well as device and user identifiers, to monitor your activity across other companies apps and websites.

Data Linked to You:
The app expanded its data collection to link specific contact information to your identity for advertising and marketing purposes, though it removed search history from the app functionality category. Precise location and purchase history remain linked to your identity for personalization and analytics.

Taste of Asia.summary: No changes in data collection or usage.

Jewellery Photo Editor New.summary:
Data Used to Track You:
The app uses your device identifier to track your activity across apps and websites owned by other companies.

Data Linked to You:
Your device ID is collected and linked to your identity for the purpose of third-party advertising.

VoicePrinter.summary:
Data Used to Track You:
VoicePrinter now tracks users across other companies' platforms using coarse location, device identifiers, and various usage and diagnostic data.

Data Linked to You:
The app collects and links device identifiers, coarse location, product interactions, and performance data to the user's identity for third-party advertising.
